entries.note: V65-B reuses the shipped V65-A delegated worker export packet by default.
V65-B remains on the same exported local scope and the same selected worker topology by default.
V65-B surfaces one explicit released worker result or conformance input rather than overreading worker law from summaries.
The worker result or conformance basis must stay consistent with the selected worker carrier, selected topology, and exported scope or fail closed.
V65-B preserves the shipped local_write/create_new semantics envelope and does not widen append, overwrite, rename, or delete semantics.
Reconciliation is not fresh local writable entitlement, fresh delegated export admission, or fresh worker-topology selection by itself.
Dispatch, execute, multi-worker, connector, and remote-operator authority remain deferred beyond V65-B.
